description_long: This kiosk is a compact, multi-faceted commercial structure integrated into a block of urban buildings, featuring a mix of flat and gabled roofs with red, green, and white coloring. The exterior walls are finished in a variety of pastel and neutral tones, including white, beige, yellow, and blue, with large window panels and detailed facades suggesting retail or service functions. The front of the kiosk is characterized by a prominent entrance area, possibly with glass doors and display windows, facing a pedestrian walkway. The structure is surrounded by other buildings, indicating its placement within a dense urban environment, and it appears to have multiple access points and windowed sections on several sides. The roof design includes both flat and sloped elements, with some overhanging sections and visible roof tiling. Architectural details such as cornices, pilasters, and decorative window frames contribute to a traditional yet functional urban style.
description: A compact, multi-sided urban kiosk with mixed flat and gabled roofs, pastel facades, and large windows, integrated into a block of commercial buildings. The structure features detailed architectural elements and multiple access points.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the kiosk's main entrance area with prominent display windows and pastel facades, facing a pedestrian walkway.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear and side of the kiosk, revealing a blue and yellow facade with a flat roof and additional window panels.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the opposite side of the kiosk, showing more of the blue and yellow facade, flat roof, and the integration with adjacent buildings.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the back and side of the kiosk, with red and green gabled roofs and a cluster of smaller adjoining structures.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign above entrance and on side panels; no visible digital or illuminated signage; text and symbols not legible
attribute_window_presence: multiple rectangular windows on front and sides
attribute_door_configuration: single main door at front entrance, possible secondary doors on sides
attribute_roof_design: combination of flat and gabled roofs with red and green tiling, some overhangs
attribute_architectural_style: traditional urban with functional commercial elements and decorative classical details
